name: Artemis
description: A flow using OHDSI ARTEMIS R package to identify chemotherapy regimens from an OMOP CDM database.

data.name: README
data.description: Describe the ARTEMIS flow and supported conditions.
data.python_code:

data.name: Artemis
data.description: Run ARTEMIS using variable-configured DB connection, schemas, condition, and parameters.
data.r_code:
library(ARTEMIS)
library(DatabaseConnector)
library(dplyr)

exec <- function(myinput) {
    # Connection details via template variables
    connectionDetails <- DatabaseConnector::createConnectionDetails(
      dbms = "{{dbms}}",
      server = "{{server}}",
      user = "{{db_user}}",
      password = "{{db_password}}",
      port = "{{db_port}}",
      pathToDriver = "{{pathToDriver}}",
      extraSettings = "{{extraSettings}}"
    )

    # Inputs via template variables
    json <- loadCohort()
    name <- "{{cohort_name}}"

    validdrugs <- loadDrugs()
    regimens <- loadRegimens(condition = "{{condition}}")
    regGroups <- loadGroups()

    cdmSchema   <- "{{cdmSchema}}"      # input schema
    writeSchema <- "{{writeSchema}}"    # output schema

    # Main
    con_df <- getConDF(
      connectionDetails = connectionDetails,
      json = json,
      name = name,
      cdmSchema = cdmSchema,
      writeSchema = writeSchema
    )

    stringDF <- stringDF_from_cdm(
      con_df = con_df,
      writeOut = FALSE,
      validDrugs = validdrugs
    )

    output_all <- stringDF %>% generateRawAlignments(
      regimens = regimens,
      g = 0.4,
      Tfac = 0.4,
      method = "PropDiff",
      verbose = 0
    )

    processedAll <- output_all %>% processAlignments(
      regimenCombine = 28,
      regimens = regimens
    )

    processedEras <- processedAll %>% calculateEras()

    regStats <- processedEras %>% generateRegimenStats()

    # OUTPUT
    writeOutputs(
      output_all,
      processedAll = processedAll,
      processedEras = processedEras,
      connectionDetails = connectionDetails,
      cdmSchema = cdmSchema,
      regGroups = regGroups,
      regStats = regStats,
      stringDF = stringDF,
      con_df = con_df
    )
}
